title: Field Syntax Library
text: Field Syntax Library Use this editor to model a reusable value for the Field Syntax property, which determines the format for data entered in the field. At runtime, the syntax is checked, and some changes may be automatically applied, to ensure that it complies with the specified format. Properties Name Description Entry Format Edit Display Prompt Dimmed Uppercase Lowercase Mandatory Overstrike Auto Jump Minimum Field Length Maximum Field Length Characters Allowed Use IME for input How to Working with Modeled Properties Related Links Field Syntax The Field Syntax property specifies the input format for data, including the entry format (for example, 1-Dec-14 or 20141201), the allowed characters, and whether the field is mandatory or read-only.
